name: Fattig Mand Bakals
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until light.
2. Add sugar and heavy cream. Beat well.
3. Add flavoring.
4. Gradually add flour, mixing well to form a smooth dough.
5. Roll out the dough to an 8-inch thickness.
6. Cut into 1 1/2-inch strips and cut diagonally every 4 inches.
7. Make a slit in either end of each strip and slip the ends through.
8. Fry in hot oil until light brown (about 1 1/2 minutes).
9. Drain, cool, and sprinkle with powdered sugar.
